Manifest.name: Pentolo® Premium & Superior
Manifest.description: Pentolo® Sometimes the right size is all it takes to make a difference. Compact show cooking, same intensity. When the space is more intimate, so is the conviviality.

hero.titleStart: Sometimes the right size is all it takes to make a difference.
hero.description: When the space is more intimate, so is the conviviality.

heartOfEvent.title: Everyone around your kitchen
heartOfEvent.p1: Pentolo is designed to create connection.
heartOfEvent.p2a: It's not the size that makes the difference.
heartOfEvent.p3c: With its original tilting system and stainless steel structure, every preparation becomes part of the show.
heartOfEvent.p4: Whether you choose a more compact or more generous size, cooking no longer stays behind the scenes.

superior.subtitle: The right size when space is part of the experience.

premium.subtitle: The new dimension of your parties.
premium.bullet3: Ideal for villas with large spaces

comparison.title: Choose the size of your experience
comparison.subtitle: Two configurations. Same quality.

features.description: Designed to last and to be the stars of the show.

IndexPage.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video.

powerAndScenography.title: Power and scenography
powerAndScenography.intro: Thanks to its generous 120 cm size:
powerAndScenography.bullet1: You can cook up to 120 servings at once
powerAndScenography.bullet2: Engage your guests in a real cooking show
powerAndScenography.bullet3: Turn an everyday gesture into a collective experience
powerAndScenography.structure: The stainless steel structure, tilting system, and CEE certification ensure solidity, safety, and reliability.
powerAndScenography.highlight: It is a tool designed to be the protagonist.

bigThings.title: For those who love to do things
bigThings.idealForDescription: For those who don't just want to organize an event, but create a moment to remember.
bigThings.bullet1: Major events and large private parties
